query_intelligence.query: SELECT COALESCE(emp.movil, '') AS dimension, '' AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(emp.nombre), '') AS nombre, '' AS empleado, COALESCE(emp.movil, '') AS movil, '' AS bodega, s.codigo AS codigo, COALESCE(MAX(cat.descripcion), '') AS descripcion, COALESCE(MAX(cat.familia), '') AS familia, COUNT(DISTINCT s.numero_serial) AS seriales_total, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CAST(s.cedula AS CHAR) ORDER BY s.cedula SEPARATOR '; ') AS cedulas_asociadas, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%MOVIL%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS en_movil, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%BASE%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%BODEGA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS en_base, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%COBRO%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%MOVIL%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%BASE%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%BODEGA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(s.estado, '')) LIKE '%COBRO%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saldo FROM logistica_cinco.logistica_base_seriales AS s LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido, COALESCE(MAX(p.estado), '') AS estado_empleado FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p GROUP BY p.cedula) AS emp ON emp.cedula = s.cedula LEFT JOIN logistica_cinco.base_codigo_seriales AS cat ON cat.codigo = s.codigo WHERE UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(cat.familia, ''))) = 'DECO' GROUP BY COALESCE(emp.movil, ''), s.codigo, cat.descripcion, cat.familia ORDER BY dimension ASC, saldo DESC, codigo ASC LIMIT 500

Por ontología y diccionario, 'móviles' se trata como dimensión de agrupación válida; la consulta requiere apoyo SQL
